heading: Imposition of sanctions with respect to fentanyl trafficking by transnational criminal organizations
label: 2353 Imposition of sanctions with respect to fentanyl trafficking by transnational criminal organizations

children.text: is knowingly involved in the significant trafficking of fentanyl, fentanyl precursors, or other related opioids, including such trafficking by a transnational criminal organization; or
otherwise is knowingly involved in significant activities of a transnational criminal organization relating to the trafficking of fentanyl, fentanyl precursors, or other related opioids.

children.heading: Sanctions described
children.label: b Sanctions described
children.text: The President, pursuant to the International Emergency Economic Powers Act ( et seq.), may block and prohibit all transactions in property and interests in property of a foreign person described in subsection (a) if such property and interests in property are in the United States, come within the United States, or are or come within the possession or control of a United States person.50 U.S.C. 1701

children.heading: Report required
children.label: c Report required
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , and annually thereafter, the President shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a report on actions taken by the executive branch with respect to the foreign persons identified under subsection (a).April 24, 2024
